title: Grit Studio Run Direct Control Observation Boundary
forbids: Studio Run in Game runtime observation bypassing the observation port, Studio RPC live readback client, or private deployment/correlation evidence boundary
why: Packet 12 makes runtime observation one private workflow boundary: after fresh log proof, the workflow asks the host observation port to correlate deployment, setup row, scripting log, and loaded-game readback, while the app observer reads loaded-game state through the Studio RPC live client backed by the direct-control service.
remediate: Keep observeRunInGameRuntime as the workflow observation port, delegate app observation to observeRunInGameRuntimeThroughStudioRpc with prepared/deployment/setup/log/correlation inputs, read loaded-game status and snapshot through the Studio RPC live client, and store observation evidence only in private runtime diagnostics.
message: Studio Run in Game runtime observation boundary drifted.
